title: Velvety Smoky Jamaican Yam Skewers
description: A malty, crispy, and romantic Jamaican dish featuring nuts and smoke, perfect for a dairy-free friendly meal. The combination of smoky flavors and velvety yams creates a unique taste experience.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together allspice, thyme, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped yams to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the yam cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the skewers with coconut oil and grill for 20 minutes, turning occasionally.
In a small bowl, mix together chopped almonds, scotch bonnet peppers, and lemon juice.
After the skewers have grilled for 15 minutes, brush with the almond mixture.
Continue grilling for an additional 5 minutes, or until the yams are tender and lightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
